error_signature: Code node spins continuously without errors
title: Code node hangs after update to 1.84.1
symptom: The Code node spins continuously without providing any error messages. There is also a noticeable slowdown in the interface.
not_this_if: Code node works in previous versions
root_cause: The N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED setting can interfere with the execution of the Code node, causing it to hang indefinitely. This setting is intended for specific use cases and may not be compatible with all workflows.
fix_steps: Remove or disable the N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED setting
agent_instruction: Disable the N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED setting and restart n8n to resolve the hanging issue.
